[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100000 2
1 0010000 1
2 0110000 2
3 0001111 4
4 0100010 2
5 0011111 5
6 1101110 5
7 0011011 4

01 10 0010000 1 match 1
12 21 0001110 3
23 32 0001010 2
34 43 0001011 3
45 54 0100010 2 match 4
56 65 0110010 3
67 76 0000010 1
70 07 0000000 a

02 20 0000000 a
13 31 0011011 4 match 7
24 42 1101110 5 match 6
35 53 0010010 2
46 64 0100010 2 match 4
57 75 0000010 1
60 06 0010000 1 match 1
71 17 0000110 2

37 73 0000010 1
